name: Mini Scallion-Sesame Cake Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the flour in a bowl and make a well in the center.
2. Pour in the water, mix well, and knead for 7-8 minutes until smooth.
3. Cover with a towel and let rest for 15 minutes.
4. Knead again for 3-4 minutes.
5. Roll into a rope and cut into 12 equal portions.
6. Roll each portion into an 4-inch pancake.
7. Brush with sesame oil, sprinkle with salt, scallions, cilantro (if used), and sesame seeds.
8. Roll up tightly into a thin rope.
9. Shape into a spiral and flatten slightly.
10. Heat the peanut oil in a large skillet over medium flame.
11. Add the scallion cakes and fry for 2-1/2 to 3 minutes per side, until lightly browned on both sides.
12. Serve hot, warm, or at room temperature.
